description: Meta-bundle that installs all four analysis skills in dependency order: brand-audit, paid-strategy-audit, creative-deep-dive, weekly-performance-deck.

post_install.name: Install Brand Audit
post_install.description: Foundation + strategy layer. Runs first — creative-deep-dive reads its output.

post_install.name: Install Paid Strategy Audit
post_install.description: Per-channel strategy briefs. Runs after brand-audit.

post_install.name: Install Weekly Performance Deck
post_install.description: Depends on all three above plus brand-kit. Installed last.

post_install.name: Introduce the new capability
post_install.description: Read post-install-intro.md from this use case folder. After all prior install and post-install steps complete, surface the file's sections to the user in chat as the closing message of the install turn: '## What just opened up' as prose, '## Try this now' as a numbered prompt list, '## Compounds with' only when present and at least one named use case is installed in the sandbox. Resolve any {{TOKEN}} placeholders using the same customize map applied during install.

changelog.notes: Added post-install intro. After install completes, Runneth surfaces a short 'what just opened up + try this now' message sourced from post-install-intro.md.
Initial release. Bundles brand-audit, paid-strategy-audit, creative-deep-dive, and weekly-performance-deck into a single install that sets up the full analysis framework in dependency order.
